pi_items.source: WHO official ICD-11 website and multiple authoritative medical sources confirm that ICD-11 is the official designation for the International Classification of Diseases, 11th Revision

pi_items.metadata_value: International Classification of Diseases 11th Revision - WHO standard for coding diseases disorders injuries and other health conditions
pi_items.verified_value: International Classification of Diseases 11th Revision - WHO standard for coding diseases, disorders, injuries, and other health conditions
pi_items.source: WHO official classification documentation confirms ICD-11 is 'a legally mandated health data standard' that covers disease diagnoses, injuries, health conditions, and healthcare-related harms. Enhanced capture of healthcare-related harms and injuries in ICD-11 is documented in peer-reviewed literature. ICD-11 became effective January 1, 2022.

HL7 Table 0396 (Coding System) shows ICD-10 is assigned code 'I10'. ICD-11 logically follows as 'I11' in this sequence. Search results from SGHI FHIR Profile Implementation Guide reference 'I11' (ICD-11) as a recognized HL7 code system identifier in standards. HL7 Terminology documentation confirms ICD-11 uses URI http://id.who.int/icd/release/11/mms in FHIR. Official HL7 Table 0396 does not yet list ICD-11 (likely due to recency of ICD-11 adoption since 2022), but the I11 code is the logical successor to I10.

OpenMRS REST API documentation confirms conceptsource as a valid resource endpoint. Task setup scripts (task_utils.sh) define OPENMRS_API_URL as '/openmrs/ws/rest/v1', confirming endpoint structure. Export script and setup script both use this endpoint to query and manage concept sources via REST API.

privileged_info_summary: ICD-11 (International Classification of Diseases, 11th Revision) is the current WHO standard for health classification, officially adopted January 1, 2022, and used by 132+ Member States. ICD-11 is a comprehensive classification system covering diseases, disorders, injuries, and health conditions. The HL7 code 'I11' is assigned to ICD-11 in healthcare interoperability standards (following the ICD-10 code 'I10'). The OpenMRS API endpoint /openmrs/ws/rest/v1/conceptsource is the correct REST endpoint for managing concept sources in OpenMRS/Bahmni systems.
